storyboard.content: I haven't slept in 4 days and my thoughts are racing so fast I can't keep up with them.
I believe I can communicate with aliens and that I'm meant to save the world.
I spent $12,000 on online shopping sprees and I've been working on a bunch of projects all at the same time.
My family says I'm talking too fast and not making any sense.
Everything has escalated really fast over the past 7 days.
I feel completely invincible, like nothing can stop me, but my functioning has fallen apart.
